channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Samsung, Oppo, Apple… qui est le champion de l’optimisation de la batterie ? Le verdict du 01lab
item.description: Les batteries en silicium carbone sont de plus en plus courantes dans les smartphones, surtout sur les modèles hauts de gamme. Ce nouveau type de batterie offre une densité plus importante et permet l'arrivée de nouveaux records d'autonomie. Mais ces nouvelles performances ne cachent-elles pas une mauvaise optimisation énergétique ? La question se pose. Vérifions cela ensemble avec les tests du 01lab....

item.title: Test de la CMF Watch 3 Pro : une montre vraiment pas chère au design étonnant
item.description: CMF revient avec le troisième modèle de sa série de montres connectées, la Watch 3 Pro. Sur le papier, la proposition est alléchante. Moins de 100 euros, GPS double-bande, autonomie annoncée excellente, écran Amoled... Voyons voir ce qu'elle vaut réellement sur le terrain.

item.title: You Can Approximate Pi by Dropping Needles on the Floor
item.description: Who needs a supercomputer when you can calculate pi with a box of sewing needles?

item.title: Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra Review: The Privacy Screen
item.description: There's not much else groundbreaking about the company's latest flagship, but the built-in privacy display works well without much trade-off.

item.title: European retailers yank popular headphones after study reports trace amounts of hormone-disrupting chemicals
item.description: Some European retailers have stopped selling certain headphones after an EU-funded study found that they contained hormone-disrupting chemicals. The study included leading brands such as Apple, Beats, Samsung, Bose, JBL, and Sennheiser. Online stores Bol.com, Coolblue, and Mediamarkt didn't respond to inquiries from The Verge about which headphones they pulled, but local news outlets report […]...

item.title: A fuel crisis is looming — here’s how much owning an EV could save you
item.description: Experts predict that we could see an increase in EV adoption as gas prices continue to increase.

item.title: Ball x Pit on mobile, Piece by Piece x2 and other new indie games worth checking out
item.description: Welcome to our latest roundup of what's going on in the indie game space. A bunch of intriguing games arrived this week, including a mobile port of one of the most absorbing things I’ve played in years and two completely different titles with the same name. Let’s get things started with a look at a few projects that were featured in the latest edition of the Future Games Show.Hyperwired (from SidralGames and publisher SelectaPlay) is a 2D roguelike shooter with an interesting resource-management twist. To recharge your weapons and systems, you have to plug a cable that trails behind your space...

item.title: Cette offre fibre ultra rapide prône le minimalisme, et c’est tant mieux pour nos économies [Sponso]
item.description: Minimalisme ne rime pas avec radinerie, et Bouygues Telecom nous le prouve avec son offre Pure fibre Plus. Un abonnement Internet ultra-rapide, sans fioritures et à prix très doux.

item.title: A Hacker Accidentally Broke Into the FBI’s Epstein Files
item.description: Plus: A porn-quitting app exposed the masturbation habits of hundreds of thousands of users, Russian hackers are trying to take over people’s Signal accounts, and more.

item.title: Identity Theft Protection Services: Do You Actually Need One?
item.description: Here's the best advice I have for protecting your identity online.

item.title: Ad-free Amazon Prime Video gets a price bump and a rebrand in the US — while 4K streaming becomes exclusive to the paid tier
item.description: If you want to go ad-free on Prime Video in the US, you're going to have to pay more starting next month.

item.title: Kindle Colorsoft Signature Edition : le prix de la première liseuse couleur d’Amazon, avec 32 Go de stockage, fond de 28 % pendant les ventes flash
item.description: C'est fin 2024 que la Kindle est enfin passée à la couleur. Voici donc la Kindle Colorsoft, disponible en version Signature Edition avec un stockage très important, que l'on trouve à 214,99 euros au lieu de 299,99 euros pendant les ventes flash de printemps d'Amazon.

item.title: Norda 001A G+ Trail Running Shoe Review: As Expensive as an Apple Watch
item.description: Do you really need a $300 trail running shoe? We test the treads, and the creds, of the Norda 001A G+.

item.title: Ireland vs Scotland Free Streams: How to watch Six Nations 2026 game, TV Channels, Preview
item.description: All the ways to watch Ireland vs Scotland live streams online – including for FREE – as both sides can still win the Six Nations 2026, plus the Triple Crown.

item.title: The ultimate entertainment budget hack: Your local library
item.description: Bereft after finishing Heated Rivalry? Hoping for more Sinners-like thrills? Your local library has what you need—and it’s free! Entertainment in 2026 is a bit of a double-edged sword. Excellent films and television shows are widely available in ways that would have sounded like science fiction just 20 years ago—but at a steep price. A single movie ticket costs an average of $16, while the average American household spends over $42 per month on streaming services, which adds up to $504 per year....

item.title: Housing market squeeze: The income needed to purchase a typical U.S. home is up 79% since 2020
item.description: Incomes haven’t kept up with the cost to buy in the for-sale market. But they’re slowly catching up. Want more housing market stories from Lance Lambert’s ResiClub in your inbox? Subscribe to the ResiClub newsletter.

item.title: Mauvaise nouvelle si vous envoyez des messages via Instagram
item.description: Meta arrête le support du chiffrement de bout en bout pour les messages directs d'Instagram après le 8 mai 2026. La décision est définitive. Récupérez vos données pendant qu’il est encore temps.

item.title: I Regret to Inform You That You’re Using an Inferior Pour-Over Coffee Brewer
item.description: The unique flat-bottom design of the Kalita Wave makes brewing exceptional coffee dead simple—especially if you can’t summon the rigor required to make perfect pour-over.
